compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add design questions and .claude/design-notes.md generation to onboarding SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add design questions from design-onboarding into the onboarding SKILL.md, with conditional activation for UI projects and .claude/design-notes.md generation.

### Requirements:
1. Design questions conditionally activated when project has UI component
2. Questions cover: vision, user archetypes, golden paths, anti-patterns, tech stack, design system, visual language, accessibility
3. .claude/design-notes.md produced as output with same structured sections as current DESIGN_NOTES.md template
4. Design questions skipped for CLI-only, library, infrastructure projects

### Reference: plugins/dso/skills/design-onboarding/SKILL.md

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (modify)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md references .claude/design-notes.md
  Verify: grep -q '.claude/design-notes.md' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Remove .test-index RED marker
  Verify: ! grep -q 'onboarding/SKILL.md.*\[test_design' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Starting task - adding design questions and .claude/design-notes.md generation to onboarding SKILL.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Read both SKILL.md files. onboarding/SKILL.md has design area in checklist and question guide but lacks: vision, archetypes, golden paths, visual language, accessibility terms. Also missing .claude/design-notes.md reference. Need to add design questions section with conditional UI activation and design-notes.md output artifact.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: RED tests confirmed - test_design_areas_complete requires vision, archetypes, golden paths, visual language, accessibility; test_design_notes_output requires .claude/design-notes.md reference. Both tests are currently RED (failing) in the test file, positioned after the GREEN tests.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Added design questions section to onboarding SKILL.md: (1) expanded area 6 design question guide with conditional activation for UI projects, covering vision/archetypes/golden paths/anti-patterns/visual language/accessibility; (2) added skip logic for CLI/library/infrastructure/non-UI projects; (3) added Step 2a to Phase 3 Completion for writing .claude/design-notes.md (UI projects only); (4) updated Quick Reference table to reference .claude/design-notes.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: All 21 tests pass GREEN (0 failures). Both previously RED tests now GREEN: test_design_areas_complete (vision, archetypes, golden paths, visual language, accessibility all present) and test_design_notes_output (.claude/design-notes.md referenced). Ready to remove RED marker from .test-index.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: RED marker [test_design_areas_complete] removed from .test-index onboarding entry. All 21 tests GREEN. Task complete. Files modified: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (design questions section + .claude/design-notes.md output), .test-index (RED marker removed).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Added design questions with conditional UI activation and .claude/design-notes.md generation
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
